overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Dishonored 2 showing exploration of the Dust District. The player ascends wooden exterior staircases between tall industrial buildings, traverses a cobblestone street with NPCs, and enters a derelict interior space filled with dust and debris. The aesthetic combines steampunk industrial elements with historic European architecture under clear midday lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway between industrial structures

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden exterior stairs along a tall building with views of distant mountains and windmills

entered.detail: tall vertical wooden beams supporting the structure
green painted metal safety railing along the walkway
large metal wind turbine on a tall pole overlooking the city
hazy mountains visible in the background beyond the city
steep wooden staircase ascending between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated wooden walkway with vertical support pillars and metal railings. The camera ascends steep wooden stairs between industrial buildings, with views of a distant windmill and mountain range visible through gaps in the structure. The environment is sunlit and devoid of people.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep street entrance to the Dust District

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the Dust District street level with text overlay appearing

agents.ego_description: emerging from the stairway onto a cobblestone street with industrial buildings and NPCs

notable_agents.action: guard in white uniform walking down the street toward the camera

entered.detail: massive tree with white-pink blossoms growing out of the building facade
ornate stone corner building with arched windows
open cobblestone area at the top of the stairs
text overlay indicating the area name

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the wooden stairway onto a cobblestone street marked as 'The Dust District'. A large blossoming tree grows from the building on the left, and a guard in white uniform walks toward the camera. The scene transitions from the narrow wooden walkway to a more open street level with stone and industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street between tall industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the cobblestone street toward a large gate structure

notable_agents.action: figure standing guard near the large gate entrance

entered.detail: metal walkway connecting the two tall buildings above the street
massive dark entrance gate at the end of the street
scattered wooden planks and rubble along the street edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow cobblestone street flanked by towering industrial buildings with wooden facades. An overhead bridge spans the street above, and debris litters the ground. The player approaches a large metal gate at the end of the street where a guard stands watch.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark entrance tunnel with industrial piping

events.description: enters the large archway gate transitioning from outdoor street to dark interior corridor
lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to dim shadow as the camera enters the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive gate into a dark sloped corridor with industrial equipment

entered.detail: massive stone and metal archway marking the entrance
thick industrial pipes running along the corridor walls
ceramic electrical insulators mounted on the walls
shadowed corridor leading deeper into the structure

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the large archway into a dark, sloped corridor. The environment shifts dramatically from the sunlit street to a shadowy interior with industrial pipes and electrical equipment lining the walls. The ground becomes concrete and the space feels enclosed and ominous.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict interior rooms with dust accumulation and broken ceiling

events.description: enters a dilapidated interior room with broken ceiling and dust-covered floors

agents.ego_description: moving through abandoned rooms filled with dust, debris, and broken structural elements

entered.detail: collapsed roof section exposing the sky above
window with metal lattice pattern allowing light to filter through
thick layer of dust and sand covering the ground
doorway leading to adjacent rooms

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a derelict interior space with a broken ceiling allowing natural light to illuminate the dust-covered floors. Lattice windows cast patterned shadows across the debris. The environment shows signs of abandonment with collapsed structural elements and accumulated dust throughout the rooms.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from sunlit industrial heights into the shadowed, derelict depths of an abandoned interior. It begins by ascending steep wooden stairs on an elevated walkway, where glimpses of a distant windmill and mountains are visible between towering buildings. As the camera emerges from the stairway, the scene opens onto a cobblestone street in the Dust District, passing a blossoming tree and a patrolling guard before moving deeper into a narrow alley flanked by wooden facades and an overhead bridge. The environment then shifts dramatically as the camera passes through a large metal gate and archway, transitioning from the bright midday light into a dark, enclosed corridor lined with industrial pipes. Finally, the movement leads into a cavernous, derelict room where a broken ceiling allows shafts of light to illuminate dust-covered floors and debris-strewn ruins.
